languages.text: "Опустим сантименты. Фактотум, что конкретно случилось на агромире Янус?"
"Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"
languages.original_text: "Опустим сантименты. Фактотум, что конкретно случилось на агромире Янус?"

traits.locale_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"
"Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"
"Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"
"Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

languages.text: «Vamos a ahorrarnos las sensiblerías. Factótum. ¿Qué ha ocurrido exactamente en el mundo agrícola de Janus?».
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: «Vamos a ahorrarnos las sensiblerías. Factótum. ¿Qué ha ocurrido exactamente en el mundo agrícola de Janus?».

languages.text: “少来这一套。高阶顾问，加努斯那个农业世界里到底发生了什么？”
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: “少来这一套。高阶顾问，加努斯那个农业世界里到底发生了什么？”

languages.text: « Évitons de basculer dans la sensiblerie, factotum. Que s'est-il passé exactement sur l'agri-monde de Janus ? »
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: « Évitons de basculer dans la sensiblerie, factotum. Que s'est-il passé exactement sur l'agri-monde de Janus ? »

languages.text: "Duygusallığı bir kenara bırakalım. Kâhya, Janus zirai dünyasında tam olarak ne oldu?"
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: "Duygusallığı bir kenara bırakalım. Kâhya, Janus zirai dünyasında tam olarak ne oldu?"

languages.text: 「感情を捨てて、ファクトム、ジャヌス農園で何が起きたのか、正確に話してください。」
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: 「感情を捨てて、ファクトム、ジャヌス農園で何が起きたのか、正確に話してください。」

languages.text: "Keine Sentimentalitäten jetzt. Faktotum, was genau ist auf der Agrarwelt Janus passiert?"
languages.original_text: "Let us dispense with sentiment. Factotum, what precisely occurred on the agri-world of Janus?"

traits.locale_text: "Keine Sentimentalitäten jetzt. Faktotum, was genau ist auf der Agrarwelt Janus passiert?"
